results.code:
767     @staticmethod
768     def create_broker(
769         broker: str,
770         api_key: str = "",
771         secret_key: str = "",
772         testnet: bool = True,
773     ) -> BrokerConnector:
774         """Create a broker connector instance."""
775         broker = broker.lower()
776         
777         if broker == "binance":
778             return BinanceConnector(api_key, secret_key, testnet)
779         elif broker == "bybit":
780             return BybitConnector(api_key, secret_key, testnet)
781         elif broker == "paper":
782             return PaperTradingConnector()
783         else:
784             raise ValueError(f"Unsupported broker: {broker}")
785
